case_title: DIPAK GANDHI VS. SEAN PATE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GANDHI, DIPAK DBA SYCAMORE STREET RESIDENCES
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PATE, SEAN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GANDHI, DIPAK DBA SYCAMORE STREET RESIDENCES
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUMB, URSULA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PATE, SEAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GANDHI, DIPAK DBA SYCAMORE STREET RESIDENCES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATE, SEAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 30 SYCAMORE STREET #12, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GANDHI, DIPAK DBA SYCAMORE STREET RESIDENCES AS TO DEFENDANT PATE, SEAN DOES 1 TO 10 RUMB, URSULA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GANDHI, DIPAK DBA SYCAMORE STREET RESIDENCES AS TO DEFENDANT PATE, SEAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PATE, SEAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GANDHI, DIPAK DBA SYCAMORE STREET RESIDENCES SERVED APR-16-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATE, SEAN
